channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'You deserved more': Instructure CEO apologizes following Canvas hack, admits company paid hackers to get stolen data back
item.description: Instructure CEO confirmed the company paid ShinyHunters to delete the stolen files.

item.title: « 5 000 W de puissance » : Anker monte en gamme avec la Solarbank 4 Pro, sa nouvelle batterie solaire plug-and-play
item.description: Anker SOLIX lance la Solarbank 4 E5000 Pro, une batterie solaire plug-and-play de 5 000 Wh capable d'absorber jusqu'à 5 000 W de puissance solaire, avec onduleur bidirectionnel, protection anti-coupure et extension possible jusqu'à 30 kWh.

item.title: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
item.description: A new startup called Dessn has raised $6M to build AI-powered design tools that work directly with production codebases.

item.title: TikTok now wants to be the place you book the trip you just saw on TikTok
item.description: TikTok is systematically converting its discovery engine into a transaction layer, which both deepens user retention and opens entirely new revenue streams for its new owners.

item.title: AI is turning connected cars into pothole-finding machines
item.description: Fleet management company Samsara has developed an AI model to detect different kinds of potholes and gauge how fast they're deteriorating.

item.title: LinkedIn wants to help your SMB grow by helping you share your story — and even offer advice to other start-ups
item.description: New data shows that entrepreneurship is becoming more accessible – LinkedIn wants to help give SMBs a fighting chance.

item.title: 'Seeing Kayce and Beth together again would be something': Dutton Ranch star teases potential future crossover with Marshals: A Yellowstone Story as Taylor Sheridan spinoff release dates clash
item.description: As Dutton Ranch debuts on Paramount+ on May 15, Marshals enters its final few weeks. According to one Yellowstone star, a Beth and Kayce Dutton crossover isn't out of the question.

item.title: TikTok adds in-app travel booking services
item.description: Your next impulse vacation is just a few taps away.

item.title: Spotify’s launches a Wrapped-style recap of your entire listening history
item.description: Spotify's new feature will show you the number of unique songs that you listened to until now

item.title: Google Home devient multitâche grâce à l’intégration de Gemini
item.description: La dernière mise à jour de Google Home intègre la version la plus avancée de Gemini. Une arrivée permettant à l’application de prendre de véritables airs d’assistant personnel en intégrant ce qu’il peut voir à sa base de données.

item.title: MG change de dimension avec sa nouvelle voiture électrique : une berline au design digne de Porsche
item.description: Plus connue pour ses SUV et ses petites voitures électriques bon marché, MG vient de présenter en Chine sa MG 07, une élégante berline qui rappelle la Porsche Taycan. Reste à savoir si elle fera le chemin jusqu'en Europe.

item.title: JBL lance une nouvelle génération d’enceintes de soirée : les PartyBox 330 et PartyBox 130
item.description: Après l’annonce des casques et écouteurs Live, JBL présente sa nouvelle gamme PartyBox avec les modèles 330 et 130, présentés comme une nouvelle génération d’enceintes conçues pour la fête, avec un design remanié, des effets lumineux retravaillés et des fonctions audio plus complètes.

item.title: JBL renouvelle sa gamme Live avec deux casques et une nouvelle série d’écouteurs
item.description: JBL enrichit sa famille Live avec les casques Live 780NC et Live 680NC, ainsi qu’avec la série d’écouteurs Live 4. La marque met en avant un son amélioré, une réduction de bruit revue et des fonctions de personnalisation plus poussées.

item.title: Sega cancels its 'Super Game' plan
item.description: The company will focus instead on classic reboots and movies.

item.title: Spotify’s latest ‘Wrapped’ covers your entire music history
item.description: Spotify is celebrating its 20th anniversary by giving listeners a "fully personalized look at their entire music history." Starting today, Spotify mobile app users can access a new Wrapped-like experience that features "never-before-shared data" going back to when they first joined the service. The "Spotify 20: Your Party of the Year(s)" experience will allow users […]...

item.title: Spotify’s new mobile experience is like a supercharged Wrapped, taking you through your entire music history since your first stream — here’s everything it offers
item.description: Your Party of the Year(s) is Spotify's latest experience that takes you on a nostalgic trip back in time over your music history.

item.title: Spotify is celebrating its 20th birthday with a Wrapped-like feature that covers your entire time on the app
item.description: This will display joining date, first song streamed and more.

item.title: 'Gen 3 is not trying to become a noisy mini-smartwatch': The RingConn Gen 3 smart ring boasts a feature that even the Oura Ring 4 and the Samsung Galaxy Ring don't have — vibration alerts
item.description: The RingConn Gen3 is now available to pre-order, and it's looking like a good subscription-free alternative to Oura — even plugging some gaps in its feature set.

item.title: Battlefield 6 developer reveals how player feedback shaped the addition of a massive fan favorite map in Season 3 — 'The worst error we can make as a dev is to drink our own Kool-Aid'
item.description: We spoke to a Battlefield 6 developer about Season 3's new massive map ahead of its launch today.

item.title: Ce forfait Free à moins de 10 euros cache plus qu’une simple enveloppe de 130 Go
item.description: À 9,99 euros par mois pendant un an, la Série Free combine 130 Go en 5G, 30 Go en Europe et DOM et plusieurs services inclus comme Free TV et l’eSIM Watch.

item.title: Garmin reveals its Garmin Forerunner 70 and Garmin Forerunner 170 'easy-to-use' running watches — just after its predecessor was used to break the 2-hour marathon world record
item.description: Garmin is upgrading its most affordable running watches — after Sebastian Sawe used a Forerunner 55 to make running history.

item.title: Why communities grow stronger when everyone shows up
item.description: When all employees are encouraged to participate, we build something far more meaningful than a volunteer program. For a long time, we thought we were doing our part. Our firm gave generously, supported causes we believed in, and showed up when asked. But over time, it became clear that something was missing. Our giving wasn’t balanced. It was concentrated. It didn’t always reach far enough into the communities where we live and work. And it didn’t always invite everyone to take part....

item.title: Garmin Forerunner 70 et 170 : les nouvelles montres de sport abordables sont enfin là (et elles changent tout)
item.description: Garmin a levé le voile, ce mardi, sur ses deux nouvelles montres running d'entrée de gamme, la Garmin Forerunner 70 et la Garmin Forerunner 170.

item.title: Intel et Nvidia confirment leur lune de miel, Serpent Lake en ligne de mire
item.description: Le CEO d'Intel Lip-Bu Tan vient de confirmer sur X que le partenariat avec Nvidia tient toujours, avec en ligne de mire un SoC x86 doté d'un iGPU GeForce RTX et des Xeon sur mesure pour les serveurs IA.

item.title: ‘We knew we couldn’t stop there’: iOS 26.5 arrives with cross-platform encrypted RCS messaging, but there’s a serious security catch
item.description: End-to-end encryption is coming to RCS messages, Apple and Google have announced.

item.title: Forza Horizon 6's unencrypted leak 'is not a result of a pre-load issue' and warns any users downloading the build with 'franchise-wide and hardware bans'
item.description: Playground Games has officially warned players to avoid the Forza Horizon 6 leak, or face a literal lifetime consequence.

item.title: 30-minute Amazon Now deliveries are coming to several cities. Here’s a list of items you can get super quickly
item.description: Utilizing a network of smaller locations ‘designed for efficient order fulfillment,’ Amazon is betting that customers will pay extra for more speed. Back in March, Amazon announced new 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options for tens of thousands of items in over 2,000 cities across America. But now the e-commerce juggernaut is making those short wait times look relatively long....

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Elite Trainer Box is under $70 on Amazon
item.description: Amazon has the Pokémon TCG Perfect Order ETB back under $70 at $69.69, with Walmart and TCGplayer in the same bracket.

item.title: I played my favorite game of all time on the PS Portal — here are 3 things I loved about the experience, and 3 things that could've been better
item.description: After finally getting my hands on the PS Portal, I decided to re-play my favorite game of all time — here's what I liked about using Sony's handheld device, and what could be improved.

item.title: AI voice startup Vapi hits $500M valuation after winning Amazon Ring over 40 rivals
item.description: Vapi says its enterprise business has grown 10-fold since early 2025 as companies shift customer support and sales calls to AI agents.

item.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill isn't a movie-length Disney+ special, but its director and star Jon Bernthal 'would love' the Marvel anti-hero to get his own adventure on the big screen
item.description: Frank Castle's MCU future will be decided by how much audience demand there is for his return, Reinaldo Marcus Green says.

item.title: iOS 26.5 : Apple ouvre enfin l’appairage simplifié aux montres et écouteurs tiers en Europe
item.description: Les utilisateurs européens d'iPhone vont pouvoir appairer leurs écouteurs tiers en un geste et recevoir leurs notifications sur une montre non Apple. Le DMA a arraché ce qu'Apple n'aurait jamais accordé de son plein gré.

item.title: eBay rejects GameStop's offer, calling it 'neither credible nor attractive'
item.description: The reaction may set in motion a hostile takeover attempt from GameStop.

item.title: 'There’s no sign in the data that AI is costing anybody their job right now': White House National Economic Council Director says AI isn’t leading to cuts — despite widespread and well-publicized layoffs across the world
item.description: White House National Economic Council Director says AI isn’t causing job cuts - despite widespread evidence to the contrary.

item.title: Le Nubia Z80 Ultra 512 Go perd 140 € : un smartphone gaming avec écran AMOLED et une endurance à toute épreuve
item.description: Le Nubia Z80 Ultra est un smartphone chinois tourné vers le gaming, que vous retrouvez dans sa version 512 Go à 659 euros sur Cdiscount au lieu de 799 euros.

item.title: I found some eerie new Backrooms marketing ahead of the horror movie's release and it's left me seriously freaked out
item.description: Backrooms fans have spotted some creepy new marketing for the anticipated new A24 horror movie.

item.title: The laser weapons race enters its industrial era
item.description: Countries around the world are rapidly deploying laser weapons for air defense and counter-drone operations. The real challenge now is producing enough systems to withstand modern saturation attacks. This article is republished with permission from Laser Wars, a newsletter about military laser weapons and other futuristic defense technology.
